revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-3-035

Alternative term: Tidal amplitude

Difference between the heights of the sea at high tide and the following low tide, or at low tide and the following high tide.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Tidal range}}
